= Contents =
    - [[#postgress|postgress]]
        - [[#postgress#pgcli connect|pgcli connect]]
        - [[#postgress#dump|dump]]
        - [[#postgress#restore|restore]]
        - [[#postgress#write to file|write to file]]
    - [[#sql|sql]]
        - [[#sql#value modification|value modification]]
            - [[#sql#value modification#insert values|insert values]]
            - [[#sql#value modification#update part of the value|update part of the value]]
            - [[#sql#value modification#delete values|delete values]]
        - [[#sql#table modification|table modification]]
            - [[#sql#table modification#add column|add column]]
            - [[#sql#table modification#rename column|rename column]]
            - [[#sql#table modification#create temp table|create temp table]]
            - [[#sql#table modification#read from CSV file|read from CSV file]]
        - [[#sql#queries|queries]]
            - [[#sql#queries#filter values|filter values]]
            - [[#sql#queries#limit query|limit query]]
            - [[#sql#queries#sort order|sort order]]
            - [[#sql#queries#query from several tables|query from several tables]]
            - [[#sql#queries#aggregate data with same values|aggregate data with same values]]

= postgress =

== pgcli connect ==
{{{
  pgcli -h localhost -u postgres
}}}

== dump ==
`pg_dump -U username > filename`
`pg_dumpall -U username > filename`

== restore ==
`psql dbname < filename`

== write to file ==
`\o filename`

= sql =

== value modification ==
=== insert values ===
{{{class="brush: sql"
   INSERT INTO table (col1, col2) VALUES (val1, val2);
}}}
=== update part of the value ===
{{{class="brush: sql"
  UPDATE table SET value = REPLACE(value, 'which', 'whith') WHERE condition;
}}}
=== delete values ===
{{{class="brush: sql"
  DELETE FROM table WHERE condition;
}}}

== table modification ==
=== add column ===
{{{class="brush: sql"
  ALTER TABLE table ADD column_name datatype; 
}}}
=== rename column ===
{{{class="brush: sql"
  ALTER TABLE table RENAME COLUMN column_name TO column_new_name; 
}}}
=== create temp table ===
{{{class="brush: sql"
  CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE table (column1 TYPE, column2 TYPE);
}}}
hint:: date field type is `TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE`

=== read from CSV file ===
{{{class="brush: sql"
  COPY table (column1, column2, ...) FROM 'filename' WITH CSV DELIMITER ',' QUOTE '"' ESCAPE '"';
}}}

== queries ==
=== filter values ===
{{{class="brush: sql"
  SELECT * FROM table WHERE string IN (value1, value2,...);
}}}
=== limit query ===
{{{class="brush: sql"
  SELECT * FROM table LIMIT num;
}}}
=== sort order ===
{{{class="brush: sql"
  SELECT * FROM table ORDER BY id asc/desc;
}}}
=== query from several tables ===
{{{class="brush: sql"
  SELECT * FROM table1 INNER JOIN table2 ON condition_of_joining WHERE ...;
}}}
=== aggregate data with same values ===
{{{class="brush: sql"
  SELECT DISTINCT column FROM ...
  SELECT column2, MAX(column1) FROM ... GROUP BY column2;
}}}
